query: SELECT DATE(event_time) as event_date, COUNT(DISTINCT worker_id) as present_count FROM attendance_events WHERE event_type = 'check_in' GROUP BY DATE(event_time) HAVING present_count < 6 ORDER BY event_date DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT DATE(event_time) as event_date, COUNT(DISTINCT worker_id) as present_count FROM attendance_events WHERE event_type = 'check_in' GROUP BY DATE(event_time) HAVING present_count < 6 ORDER BY event_date DESC LIMIT 5;
